## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Surge AI & GrowthX event strategy, focusing on a happy hour and dinner event.](https://fathom.video/share/znYfs66o6hhyGp6hDso-J3DgzAZazKAY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Happy hour event (Southern View venue) to include interactive elements like model comparisons and "labeling party" examples to encourage engagement](https://fathom.video/share/znYfs66o6hhyGp6hDso-J3DgzAZazKAY?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Dinner event (Quince) aims for high-touch experience to build long-term client relationships and industry diffusion](https://fathom.video/share/znYfs66o6hhyGp6hDso-J3DgzAZazKAY?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [GrowthX team to handle invitations using Nick's alias for broader reach](https://fathom.video/share/znYfs66o6hhyGp6hDso-J3DgzAZazKAY?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Swag and food quality emphasized for both events to ensure premium experience](https://fathom.video/share/znYfs66o6hhyGp6hDso-J3DgzAZazKAY?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)

## Topics
